title: Russia launches massive strike on Ukraine as Poland scrambles jets, Finland restricts airspace
summary_full: The Russian defence ministry said that it launched a "massive strike using long-range precision air, land, and sea-based weapons and attack drones."
summary_public: The Russian defence ministry said that it launched a "massive strike using long-range precision air, land, and sea-based weapons and attack drones."

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russia launches massive strike on Ukraine
